creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Created attachment 197871
svn-diff-libressl-duo

fails with:
--- https.lo ---
https.c:358:1: error: static declaration of 'HMAC_CTX_new' follows non-static declaration
HMAC_CTX_new(void)
^
/usr/local/include/openssl/hmac.h:86:11: note: previous declaration is here
HMAC_CTX *HMAC_CTX_new(void);
          ^
https.c:368:1: error: static declaration of 'HMAC_CTX_free' follows non-static declaration
HMAC_CTX_free(HMAC_CTX *ctx)
^
/usr/local/include/openssl/hmac.h:87:6: note: previous declaration is here
void HMAC_CTX_free(HMAC_CTX *ctx);
     ^
2 errors generated.
*** [https.lo] Error code 1
